description_long: This is a dark, ceramic cup with a striking and eerie design, featuring neon green graphics and text. One side displays a sinister, smeared smiley face reminiscent of graffiti or comic book villain iconography, while the rest of the cup is covered in repeated 'JA' text and the phrase 'WELCOME TO THE MADHOUSE' in bold, green letters. The handle is uniquely shaped, jagged and angular, adding to the unsettling aesthetic. Inside the cup, there is a floating eyeball, further enhancing its macabre and playful theme. The surface appears slightly worn, with a matte finish and visible scuff marks, suggesting frequent use or intentional distressing.
description: A dark ceramic cup with neon green graffiti-style artwork, a jagged handle, and a floating eyeball inside. The cup features bold text and a worn, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sinister green smiley face and the jagged handle, with the eyeball visible inside.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the back of the handle and the repeated 'JA' text pattern, with the eyeball still visible.
description_view_2: Side view displays the phrase 'WELCOME TO THE MADHOUSE' and more of the 'JA' pattern, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the cup, showing more 'JA' text and the edge of the smiley face, with the handle mostly hidden.
